title: Technical Feasibility Is Not Justification
prompt: Ask whether the proposed target is legitimate, the data are appropriate, and the decision should be automated at all.

title: Non-Use Is Governance
prompt: Document rejection, delay, limitation, pause, rollback, or retirement as an accountable decision.

title: Some Problems Need Non-Algorithmic Alternatives
prompt: Compare automation with policy redesign, staffing, participatory review, appeal infrastructure, and service improvements.
